name: Tri-Star
short_description: Tri-Star is an endless horizontal-scrolling space shooter featuring Roguelike and Roguelite elements. Blast through waves of enemies and battle against arduous bosses. Form a squadron of three unique ships from an expanding roster and equip them with upgrades as you engage in a battle for survival.
detailed_description:
Tri-Star is a an endless horizontal-scrolling space shooter featuring Roguelike and Roguelite elements. Blast your way through waves of tricky enemies to face off against arduous boss battles. Form a squadron of three unique ships from an expanding roster and kit them out with upgrades as you engage in a battle for survival. Defeat bosses and achieve high scores to unlock a large pool of new enhancements, game modes and ships to try on your next playthrough.

  • Squadrons: Select three ships and manage their loadout as you attempt to get as far as you can. Leave damaged ships at base to be repaired while you continue the fight
  • 12 Playable Ships: Each with its own primary and special weapons
  • Custom Loadout: Use the scrap of your fallen enemies to enhance 6 different stats and attach over 60 varied upgrades
  • Endless Replayability: Play again and again through mostly randomly generated levels
  • Score Attack: Short on time? Go solo with no repairs or upgrades and amass as high of a score as you can
  • Ace Mode: Prove you have what it takes to take on fiercer enemies who will show no mercy
